name: Commissariato Generale — Embassy of Italy in Belgrade

outreach.notes: LIVE sponsorship call for the ~1,000 m2 Italy Pavilion — tiers Bronze EUR 5-25k / Silver 25-50k / Gold 50-100k / Platinum 100k+, financial + value-in-kind, open to all economic operators, DEADLINE 31 Aug 2026. Submit via PEC amb.belgrado@cert.esteri.it or economico.belgrado@esteri.it; tel +381 11 3066100. Full call PDF: ambbelgrado.esteri.it/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Prot.-0003909P (A).
